speaker: MATT
raw_text: This would be the long rest-- for everyone but Fjord, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (screaming) (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While that era of the story is transpiring, I want to ask you guys, since we have a moment here--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: While they're fucking?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or in the loose, wibbly-wobbly, timey-wimey period of figuring things out as you recover from the intense return to the ship. What would you like to do? Is there anything you want to check up on? First of all, everyone leveled up to seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did we get a long rest after?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: This is that night. We will then begin to embark on what that journey will be, but if there's anything you wish to do before the evening's done.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (screaming) (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While that era of the story is transpiring, I want to ask you guys, since we have a moment here--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: While they're fucking?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or in the loose, wibbly-wobbly, timey-wimey period of figuring things out as you recover from the intense return to the ship. What would you like to do? Is there anything you want to check up on? First of all, everyone leveled up to seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did we get a long rest after?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be the long rest-- for everyone but Fjord, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nice. This isn't the next few days of our sailing adventure, this is that night?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No. An entire day of travel which is a bit faster than a general sailing ship which is why the Mistake can go faster, but they're a pair. You're looking at about 14 days of travel.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Have fun drawing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As everyone concludes their evening activities, the journey, looking at the map and the distance, is about 800 miles to Darktow from Urukayxl.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (intones theme from Pirates of the Caribbean)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, essentially. The ship normally--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus Christ!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should solve this at some point, right? We should get some bean bags or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably just rotate it. Maybe if you would roll it the other direction, it straightens it out. Did you know that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Put in under my-- okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now it's not centered. Whatever. It's fine. You guys deal with your map. It's not mine. It's your map. Do what you want. Not my responsibility! Your ship is actually traveling faster than it normally was as part of the blessing that Avantika received. It can achieve about 55 miles--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: An hour?!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: They don't have bullet trains in D&D. You have 11 days of supplies. There will have to be some sort of supply stop or a way of handling that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should solve this at some point, right? We should get some bean bags or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably just rotate it. Maybe if you would roll it the other direction, it straightens it out. Did you know that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Put in under my-- okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now it's not centered. Whatever. It's fine. You guys deal with your map. It's not mine. It's your map. Do what you want. Not my responsibility! Your ship is actually traveling faster than it normally was as part of the blessing that Avantika received. It can achieve about 55 miles--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: An hour?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. An entire day of travel which is a bit faster than a general sailing ship which is why the Mistake can go faster, but they're a pair. You're looking at about 14 days of travel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To Darktow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To Darktow, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 14 days?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome to being on the open seas, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Not to get to Darktow. At Darktow, there will be repairs made to the other ship and possibly some small repairs to the ship for its journey and any other supplies you would need while there. It's a 14 day journey at full speed. During this time, a couple of things. One, you guys can decide to, if you want to, learn how to run a boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To Darktow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To Darktow, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 14 days?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome to being on the open seas, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They don't have bullet trains in D&D. You have 11 days of supplies. There will have to be some sort of supply stop or a way of handling that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have a thing called Create Food and Water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I do too.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can mix it up with the normal food so it doesn't taste as bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is going to make this journey not an issue when it comes to supplies. Look at that. (singsong) Divine magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Teamwork!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't have to stop then. All right, great!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So sorry. We just burned an entire encounter like, "Yeah! Fuck whatever Matthew made."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is food and water the only thing we need? Do we need any other supplies to make this trip? I don't know.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: We'll find out. Train as the boatswain. Which, actually, to that point, the next morning, as everyone begins to go about the first real day out here in the Lucidian Ocean, clear blue sky with dappled bits of cloud around you, the smell of sea salt and foam and spray making its way as it splashes across the front of the bow, Avantika catches up to you with Vera being called up to the side. She goes, "Vera, if you'd be so kind, I would like to call-- let's say the utmost members of the crew, please, to the deck. Maybe some of your friends as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Powder monkey?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Powder monkey.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe I'll apprentice as that first?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Apprentice as powder monkey and, should it be needed, you'll become, hopefully, a good master gunner. Those are the most important aspects. Everyone'll learn a little bit about sailing as you go, but start getting an idea, if you want to right now, which one of those you'd want to specifically begin to focus on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What does the boatswain do again?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Manager of the ship. Like the office manager, right? Keeps it running?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, makes sure that all the canvas, the ropes, the wood, everything's in good condition.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I have experience being a quartermaster, so I'll do that as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He said quartermaster, not boatswain.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess I'll do the boatswain stuff? I feel like I'll be really bad at it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A few days into this journey, we'll say because you're training as the carpenter--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm strong, maybe I should be the carpenter!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you have any--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I've got no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What was that cooper position? Barrels?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Makes and maintains barrels.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, you've been around barrels your whole life!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I already know how to make a barrel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to be the boatswain?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was thinking the one where you actually have to go out and find supplies. I might be really good at that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is the boatswain.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll take the boatswain.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then I'll do the carpenter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go. Note that somewhere on your character that those are the positions you're training on this journey. All right, cooper, got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Making barrels.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm the gunner! Well, the powder monkey.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Powder monkey for now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: For now. Working my way up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He's sitting there going like, "(grunting) Well, I had a rough fight with some scurvy a few years back and a few things I like the idea of ladies in the sea that can save me from scurvy."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's got his patch over his eye, right up against one of the portholes where the light's coming through and he's using it for perspective, and he's lording over this smaller, thin human, and glances over, "Oh, hey there."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I go stand over his shoulder and stare at what he's doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you keep watch and he's doing this curled mermaid that is coming up and, on one hand is holding on at the hip and the other is picking a fruit off of a tree. You begin to question the design a bit and Orly says, offhand, "It's what he requested."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Why are you having a mermaid pick fruit if she's in the water?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We'll see how time goes by. For the time being, just let me know if I can be of service." He talks to you about it and he gives you an overview of his capabilities. For different types of gem dust, he can imbue somebody with a series of tattoos that can alter elements of their physical self. It's not inexpensive, and each person can only have it once ever, so it's not like you can have multiple. For 2,200 gold worth of a ruby dust he can imbue a permanent +1 to strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Gem dust. Like a gem that's been powdered?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or like ink?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, I have plenty of ink. It's m-m-more--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are you trying to make a sparkly ink?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "M-m-more or less."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I don't have any powdered gems, but I could probably powder some gems.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I picked up this technique years ago from some of the individuals that spawned from the legacy of the island folk. It allows me to instill a m-m-mighty ink spot." As he does that, he flexes his arm and the tattoo shimmies every so slightly and his muscles bulge a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god. Will you teach me how to do that if I give you some dust?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "See, it's not so much something that can be easily taught; more that it's something bequeathed by an elder."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to bequeath me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if you really like me, though?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Roughly eight days into this journey, you've moved about 100 miles off the shore of the southern island of Bwuali when a small horn sound goes off on the Squalleater. (horn call) It's a small horn. It's a very small horn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasping)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Aquamarine dust being the one that boosts charisma.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Orly, you're so charismatic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "(laughs) M-m-many folk have said that."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I would definitely want to learn this from you, and I probably, once I get a little more rich and I have some powdered gems, I'm going to have you do it to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, looks like you're just going to have to keep me employed for quite a while."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, don't get hurt, okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Don't get me hurt." He goes back to finishing up the tattoo on the individual.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, what was the guy's name that was getting a tattoo?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was Waldok.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Waldok. Well, Waldok, I'll see you later.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "(grunts) Okay."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go carpenter some stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A 22?! They all look at each other and begin to back even further away from the edge. One of them rushes down and goes deeper into the ship and a moment later returns with one figure which appears to be better dressed than the others. You see very bright blonde hair and a relatively well-dressed leather tunic over decent captain's clothing. He comes to the front and goes, "I am the captain of The Stormcap. Who am I to be parlaying with?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Soon as that sentence comes to an end, you hear a rapid clattering of heavy wood against wood. It's all of the various ports and doors in the interior of the ship all manage to slam open at once. All the members on the opposite side look at each other. Make an intimidation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What number is that? I have a number in that, let's see what it does. That's a 22.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So over the next ten minutes or so, you'll be able to provide a fine tattoo of that simple design.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bust out the tattoo stuff that Orly's been teaching me. I'm going to give him a tat while all that's going on! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is the darkest timeline. Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Unmolested, except for--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And that's how I got this!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where do you want it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm having bad flashbacks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's just like, "I-- what?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It'll be so good. It's going to be so beautiful.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This poor guy!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You've got to test on somebody.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, I like it! Let's get your clothes open. While everything's going on, I'm just going to spend--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While you're prepping, he just looks over at the captain very mournfully, and the captain's like--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's just going to be one smiley line with two tusks sticking out of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Vampire.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You've been abducted-- no, by Captain Tusktooth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a dexterity check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like, you've been abducted, congratulations.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh! 19!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, that brings us to Bouldergut's turn. (laughter) Bouldergut. There's not a lot of space here, so I'm going to give her disadvantage on her attack because she has to try and swing this large greatclub in this enclosed space as an ogre. Charging by, (roaring), comes down to do an overhead strike. Actually, it would have advantage because stunned, so it's just a regular roll. Let me try that again. Yeah, that's a natural 14, that hits. For that, he takes 13 points of damage on that hit. The other attack-- 17, that hits. Another 15 points of damage. Nice. As he's on one knee, Bouldergut comes around and she slams. He almost falls to the ground again. The giant impact slamming into the back of the metal-- You can see that actual armor dented inward from the impact. She pulls up for a second strike down on top. This one actually sends him down on the ground. He's trying to get back up from that impact. The back of the armor is pushed in. It's limited some of his mobility within his shoulder blades from the way the metal's pushed towards his upper shoulder. That's going to end Bouldergut's turn. It's now Frumpkin's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One more time. Ki point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Another ki point. That is a 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's stunned!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: First strike, no impact, he pulls back. He's rearing to try and deflect, or at least keep you at bay. The second strike, as you crack right across the side of the head, he goes down onto one knee. You see him, his eyes go wide as they're rolling a little bit in his skull, and he's currently trying to shake-- You rung his bell. You still have your bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: My bonus action--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With advantage, if you're--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, he's stunned! Yeah, that's an 18 to hit, a natural 18. And another goddamn one! Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Five points of damage. He's stunned and on his knee.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to look at Frumpkin again and be like: Caleb, if you're watching, I don't trust Avantika? That's probably all I can say.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's like five or so; you're like an hour or two from dusk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, when we want to find the ship, I think I might be able to help.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: With the seducing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What? No. I mean, no. Definitely not.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, Caduceus, if you want to teach me a thing a two about wooing a woman--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah no, I really don't think I have anything to add to that. I think you've been doing just fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes to what you said, and yes to what you said.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think I might be able to help you find the ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You want me to help seduce Avantika.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You just do you, girl.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't understand what any of this is anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I think that will be very valuable when the time comes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I thought-- Oh, about finding the ship, that's all.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: About what time of the day is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, it's later afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! It's early.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Time to break out the banana margaritas! It's only afternoon!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's four o'clock!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A few more days' travel to Darktow. A couple of moments here. In one night that you are in your room sketching your book, testing out some of your new paints, you feel a hand on your shoulder. You glance over and you can see the pale, soft fingers and a dark greenish sleeve resting there. You glance over to the side and you can see the draping hood and the slight curved smile across the angular chin of the Traveler protruding from beneath the cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think you know what I mean, but in case this thing gets out of hand, can I count on you to right the ship if need be?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Keep the group safe?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As always, I will do my best.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank you and thank you for talking with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I cough very hard into my hands and cast Message to him and briefly, quietly say: I think that woman is going to try to kill you, I really do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Just so. I'll turn and walk off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (coughing)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You need some water, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, do you have some?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Uh. (pause) I create water in my hands.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Wait, you can do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I receive it. There's not much left. Most of it spilled.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll keep creating it in your hands as you drink.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You can create water?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: When did that happen?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I've always been able to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shut up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this a custom?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Just keep drinking. Keep going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's good.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: In the next few days that pass, eventually the fog rolls in and the blue, cloudy skies you have become familiar with on this journey give way to gray, rainy, and cold, this marine front rolling in as you begin to come upon the outskirts of the Dragshallow Reefs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There's another reef here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then there's Torrid Reef here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There is, and then dead center is a lot of space. You could say that this is the center, but-- okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are any of those places close to your shipwreck that you know of?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, the shipwreck is here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is this triangle of? Where the three objects are, or where the three temples are?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, in the vision the three land masses are in a triangle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you know in which direction the ship was heading?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: At the time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At the time, from what you recall, the ship was heading outward.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so it'd be heading west.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe he knew where to go, and he was heading there to get his gift.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Said Beau in a morning breakfast conversation or something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Anyway. Contemplate this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll be doing that later.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: With this one, it would be, yeah, dex, since you've already made one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm talking like a pinch here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shawshank style?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, little pinches at a time. I don't want tons, I'm not trying to steal a barrel, just enough to make one of those bangy arrows again, just enough for the tip of an arrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, make a sleight of hand check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a natural one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You steal, over time, a pretty decent amount of this powder. You're pretty damn proud of it, yeah. Write down on your inventory you have a handful of pepper. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Black pepper.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to be trying to construct a explosive arrowhead at some point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Awesome, go ahead and roll for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've successfully secured deez nuts.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What am I doing? Tinker's?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be tinker tools, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could make a sneeze arrow, in theory.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is it, dex?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The ship skirts around the southern edge of the reefs. You can now see the tangled graveyard of destroyed ships and gathered driftwood marking the shallow spots across this jagged cluster of reef. Curving around a southwestern passage, a channel, that opens. The channel beckons you entry as you turn to head northward to what would be the center, the heart of this cluster. No more than maybe 20 minutes into entering this channel, Avantika shouts up at the rest of the crew, "Raise the colors!" at which point the massive ogre, Bouldergut, tosses the gnomish second mate, Ipess, high up to the central mast, to the crow's nest, where he swaps out the flag to a new one, one that is straight purple. As it begins to push its way in, make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, make a sleight of hand check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a natural one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You steal, over time, a pretty decent amount of this powder. You're pretty damn proud of it, yeah. Write down on your inventory you have a handful of pepper. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Black pepper.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to be trying to construct a explosive arrowhead at some point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Awesome, go ahead and roll for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've successfully secured deez nuts.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What am I doing? Tinker's?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be tinker tools, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could make a sneeze arrow, in theory.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is it, dex?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With this one, it would be, yeah, dex, since you've already made one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15? Yeah, you manage to construct a pepper arrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If someone's allergic, they're fucked, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pepper bolt, there you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: When life gives you pepper, make pepper arrows.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As the ship makes its way to the docks and eventually comes to a stop, you can see a few figures up there at the edge, one of them that rings a bell as it comes in, and a couple that come out to meet Avantika. Steps out, and there's a couple of hands raised, and go, "Hail, Avantika!" She goes, "We have returned! I know it has been quite a while, but success and celebration, I believe, are on our lips tonight." A few of the men come up and look over the crew and look over a few of you and take some notes, and then dart off.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Darktow!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Dope.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Beautiful.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Winding through the docks, following the rest of Avantika's crew, the docks and bridges, it's this labyrinth to find your way beyond that to the stone and rock where you had kissed earlier. The city itself is a series of switchback paths and carved caverns and cave entrances that have since been outfitted with pieces of wood, with windows. Now, at this point, it's pretty much pitch black in the sky. What little bit of light there is from the nearby torch and lantern light gives just a hint of the mist that's rolled in across the outskirts of the island. The only light sources you have are those you keep on you, or the distant glowing smattering of hundreds of fire-lit windows, lit from the inside the warm buildings that make up the city. As you make your way to what you assume to be the tavern, The Bloated Cup, if you will, Avantika's currently standing outside talking to somebody. There you see this burly, rough-looking human man, probably a week and a half unshaven, this thick five o'clock shadow. Grayish curled hair that goes right about shoulder-length. It's slicked back, probably with his fingers to one side, but it's oily enough where it stays in place. Looks like he's wearing an officious coat, and they're currently in the middle of a discussion, and she looks over her shoulder to the rest of you and goes, "Ah, my apologies. There is one bit of business we must attend to before we can celebrate. The rest of you continue on. My new compatriots, it seems," and the human figure pipes up and goes, "Word has reached the ears of the Plank King that you've brought new blood here to Darktow. I imagine these are the new blood based on," and he looks at a sheet of paper that's handed to him and looks at the description that was written, "and he would appreciate you bringing them to The Throne Roost and have an audience."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Something they would wear that would identify.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, is there anyone in charge, or is it just a saloon with cowboys everywhere?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's more the former than the latter, from the first part. There is no uniformed guard, there is no--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They're not wearing a hat or a sash.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is golden age of piracy Barbados, basically. We're in the thick of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the heavy realm of piracy has only existed for 40-plus years, on this coast.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh wow, okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's still, in some ways, finding its footing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh lord! We all going to die! We'll tell the crew they can have the evening. They can have the evening, we've just been at sea this whole time, but in the morning, we expect work to continue on The Mistake.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Probably the only rule here is "Talk shit, get hit."
